raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent names the load-bearing concept (lithium plating onset) and shows where the draft drifts from it, proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, providing a nuanced view of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift from the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original and addresses them.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent names the load-bearing concept (lithium plating onset) and shows where the draft drifts from it, proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, providing a nuanced view of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift from the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original and addresses them.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability.
